name: GKE Secrets Encrypted with Cloud KMS
description: GKE clusters should use Cloud KMS keys to encrypt Kubernetes secrets at the application layer for enhanced security
remediation: Enable application-layer secrets encryption using a Cloud KMS key
remediation_steps: Create a Cloud KMS key ring and key if not exists
Grant the GKE service account access to use the key
Update the cluster: gcloud container clusters update CLUSTER_NAME --database-encryption-key=projects/PROJECT/locations/LOCATION/keyRings/RING/cryptoKeys/KEY
